patterns.name: reasoning
patterns.description: Step-by-step logical analysis and problem decomposition
patterns.suitable_for: complex problems, algorithm design, systematic analysis

patterns.name: critique
patterns.description: Critical analysis, evaluation, and assessment of existing solutions
patterns.suitable_for: code review, quality assessment, identifying weaknesses

patterns.name: reflect
patterns.description: Self-reflection and iterative improvement of solutions

patterns.name: question
patterns.suitable_for: requirement gathering, problem clarification, exploratory analysis

patterns.name: summarize
patterns.description: Information synthesis and concise summary generation

patterns.name: conclude
patterns.description: Decision making and conclusion drawing from available information

patterns.name: modify
patterns.description: Adaptive modification and improvement of existing solutions

patterns.name: planning
patterns.description: Strategic planning and systematic approach to problem solving
patterns.suitable_for: project planning, architecture design, workflow organization
